items.title: Grant Google Search Console access to Influex
items.summary: Influex needs tech@influex.com added as Full User in Google Search Console to complete AEO analytics setup and link with GA4 for keyword-level data.
items.actionNeeded: Coordinate with UpQode team to add tech@influex.com as Full User in Google Search Console.

items.title: Review AEO copy deliverables and positioning statements
items.summary: Influex has submitted AEO Copy Approval Sheet with declarative positioning statements and FAQ schema copy for review, along with a Loom walkthrough from Peter.
items.actionNeeded: Review AEO copy approval sheet and query landscape document, provide feedback to Influex.

items.title: Reschedule 2MM coaching calls for July 13th
items.summary: Janelle confirmed Hank's call moved to 9am ET on 7/13. Steve unavailable at requested times; alternative Friday 7/17 at 12:30pm ET proposed or email updates instead.
items.actionNeeded: Confirm availability for Steve's call on Friday 7/17 at 12:30pm ET or approve email updates.

items.title: Sign UpQode SEO/AEO formal agreement
items.summary: UpQode has prepared formal agreement based on discussed action plan and sent PandaDoc link for signature to proceed with SEO/AEO work.
items.actionNeeded: Review and sign UpQode agreement via PandaDoc link to proceed with SEO/AEO services.
